title: Cranichis lehmanniana

This classification places it among the terrestrial orchids, a subfamily of orchids known for their distinctive flowers and unique growth habits. Within the Orchidaceae family, Cranichis lehmanniana is further classified as a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae. intro: Cranichis lehmanniana, commonly known as Lehmann's cranichis, is a species of orchid native to South America. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, protect against cell damage, and prevent infections.
